title: design: JSON Pointer patch key format mirrors spec exactly
description: message_set_update (lines 175-194 in methods/message.rs) builds reaction patch keys as format!("reactions/{sender_reaction_id}") per RFC 6902 (JSON Patch) and RFC 8620 §5.3. This is exact-to-spec, no abstraction layer. The implementation is transparent: readers can cross-reference the spec directly. The test (Test 31, lines 1207-1259) verifies the exact patch key format and emoji/sentAt structure, confirming correctness via oracle.
close_reason: Design decision: good design, no action needed
